'''Holowan''' was a [[droid]] manufacturer whose divisions, [[Holowan Laboratories]] and [[Holowan Mechanicals]], created the [[IG-series]] of [[droid]]s<ref name="Helmet Collection 25" /> after inheriting early plans from the defunct [[Phlut Design Systems]].<ref name="R2-D2 16">{{BuildR2Cite|16|Droid Directory}}</ref>
